message:
fix(codegen): Fix str.join, set.discard, and string_utils import

- Add pyJoin to string_utils to handle PyValue, slices, arrays and ArrayLists
- Update genJoin in string.zig to use runtime.string_utils.pyJoin
- Fix genDiscard to wrap in block to avoid syntax error when used in assertRaises context
- Fix string_utils import path to ./runtime/string_utils.zig

These fixes enable test_tuple.py (31 tests) and test_bool.py (284 tests) to pass.
